headline: CMA Section 233 used against 52 activists
context: The Communications and Multimedia Act's Section 233 on improper use of network facilities was invoked against 52 individuals in 2025 for online criticism.

cards.big: 52 Malaysians investigated under CMA Section 233 in 2025
cards.sub: Vague wording on 'annoying' content enables broad enforcement

cards.big: Section 233 carries a maximum fine of RM50,000 or 1 year jail
cards.sub: Originally intended for telecommunications misuse, now applied to speech

cards.big: Article 10 of Federal Constitution guarantees freedom of expression
cards.sub: Courts have yet to definitively rule on CMA-constitutional rights conflict

cards.big: 67% of those investigated were first-time commentators on public issues
cards.sub: Chilling effect documented by Malaysian Bar Council survey in 2025

cards.big: Does criminalising 'annoying' speech protect society or punish participation?
MCMC issued 1,200 content removal orders in the first half of 2025
